research_topic: Light-asset travel compounder with business travel recovery optionality
latest_delta: Q4 2025 EPS 小幅 miss，但全年指引與高端/國際需求仍穩健。
MAR 的 thesis 從疫情後修復轉成高品質現金流與商旅回溫的防禦型持有。
若總經衰退擴散到高端與商務需求，才會進入 thesis breaker。
noise_filters: Single-quarter EPS miss without RevPAR weakness
Headline volatility in lower-end domestic travel

thesis.statement: Marriott 受惠於輕資產模式、高端與國際旅遊韌性，以及企業差旅回溫，因此在景氣不確定環境下仍能維持穩定現金流與較佳下行保護。
thesis.core_catalyst: Business travel recovery and stable international/high-end RevPAR.
thesis.market_blind_spot: 市場容易把 MAR 當純週期股，但其資本輕、品牌強與回購能力提供了更好的防禦質地。
thesis.expiry_condition: High-end and business travel demand crack together in a deeper macro slowdown.

assumptions.statement: High-end and international travel remain resilient enough to offset weaker low-end domestic demand.
assumptions.verification_method: RevPAR mix and management commentary by segment.
assumptions.invalidation_condition: High-end and international RevPAR both roll over materially.

assumptions.statement: Business travel improves through 2026 and supports occupancy and pricing.
assumptions.invalidation_condition: Corporate travel recovery stalls for another full cycle.

assumptions.statement: The asset-light model preserves downside protection and cash return flexibility.
assumptions.verification_method: Cash return guidance, leverage, and fee-based earnings mix.
assumptions.invalidation_condition: Fee earnings weaken materially and leverage rises without demand support.

risks.statement: Macro recession broadens from budget travel to high-end and business travel.
risks.leading_indicator: Forward bookings and corporate travel commentary
risks.response: Exit if premium segments crack together.

risks.statement: International travel momentum fades as FX or geopolitics worsen.
risks.response: Trim and lower the valuation range.

risks.statement: Market rotates away from quality defensives even if fundamentals hold.

valuation_regime.switch_trigger: Business travel recovery becomes visible while premium segments stay resilient.
valuation_regime.re_rating_logic: The market pays for durable fee earnings and cash returns rather than pure cycle recovery.
valuation_regime.associated_risk: If the cycle weakens across all segments, the quality premium disappears.

scenarios.trigger: Premium and international demand remain healthy and business travel improves gradually.
scenarios.logic: MAR compounds through a quality earnings profile rather than a hot cycle.

scenarios.trigger: Corporate travel snaps back and forward bookings beat expectations.
scenarios.logic: The market re-rates MAR from cycle recovery to durable compounding.
scenarios.action: Add on confirmation from RevPAR and bookings.

scenarios.trigger: Budget weakness starts leaking into premium segments.
scenarios.logic: The thesis weakens but cash-return quality still matters.
scenarios.action: Trim, but do not exit until premium demand clearly breaks.

scenarios.trigger: Deep recession hits business and premium travel together.
scenarios.logic: Downside protection is no longer enough to support the valuation.

action_rules.condition: Corporate travel and forward bookings improve while international RevPAR remains strong.
action_rules.action: Add selectively after management confirms trend persistence.

action_rules.condition: Premium segment demand softens without offsetting business-travel recovery.
action_rules.action: Trim and keep only defensive core size.

action_rules.condition: High-end and business travel weaken together in a deeper recession.

next_must_check_data: Next earnings: RevPAR mix, corporate travel commentary, forward bookings, and cash return guidance.
research_debt: Need a cleaner framework for group and convention demand sensitivity.
Need cross-check on Europe and Asia RevPAR versus US softness.

version_log.reason: Baseline migration from legacy March update.
version_log.impact: Established living thesis and machine-readable state.

seed_events.title: 2026 guidance stayed intact despite a small EPS miss.
High-end and international travel stayed firm while lower-end US demand softened.
